title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 4: The Arrival at the Cedar Forest
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 4 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: They reach the Cedar Forest and Gilgamesh is frightened by dreams.
introduction: Tablet 4 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: They reach the Cedar Forest and Gilgamesh is frightened by dreams.

translation.text: The forest was filled with cedars. Their shade was good, full of delight. Humbaba's roar was the deluge, his mouth was fire, his breath was death.
